content: Branch-wise tuition fee per semester: CSE: Rs 1,50,000; IT: Rs 1,50,000; ECE: Rs 1,50,000; EEE: Rs 1,50,000; Mechanical: Rs 1,50,000; Civil: Rs 1,50,000; Aeronautical: Rs 1,50,000;

title: Delhi Technological University Branch-wise Cutoffs
content: Branch-wise expected cutoff ranks: CSE: Top entrance score required; IT: High score required; ECE: Moderate-high score; EEE: Moderate score; Mechanical: Moderate score; Civil: Average score; Aeronautical: Moderate-high score;

title: Delhi Technological University Fee Structure
content: Tuition fee ranges from Rs 50,000 to Rs 1,50,000 per semester depending on institute type. Hostel fee is around Rs 20,000-40,000 per semester and mess charges Rs 15,000-25,000.

title: Delhi Technological University Cutoff and Admission Criteria
content: Admission is based on JEE Main or JEE Advanced depending on institute. Top branches like CSE require ranks within top 100-2000 for IITs and 1000-10000 for NITs/IIITs.

title: Delhi Technological University Scholarships
content: Scholarships include Merit-cum-Means, fee waivers for SC/ST students, and government scholarships for economically weaker sections.

title: Delhi Technological University Hostel Facilities
content: Hostel facilities include Wi-Fi, mess, laundry, and sports amenities. Charges range between Rs 30,000-60,000 per semester.
